violations.text: Various food product was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023

The facility is lacking a three compartment sink to wash, rinse, and sanitize utensils and/or equipment. Facility to use single service items/disposable serving utensils until 3 bay sink is installed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023
